message:
🐛 Default demoWhenEmpty to true when demoData is provided (#2783)

On fresh startup, there's a window where all data sources are
unavailable (agent WebSocket hasn't delivered clusters, backend
token isn't set, demo mode is off). Cards with fetchers that
return [] during this window showed blank/empty states.

Fix: if a hook provides demoData, automatically enable
demoWhenEmpty fallback. Cards show demo data immediately while
the agent connects, then swap to real data once available. This
eliminates the blank state on startup without requiring explicit
demoWhenEmpty: true on all 39 cached data hooks.

Cards that explicitly set demoWhenEmpty: false can still opt out.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -791,7 +791,7 @@ export function useCache<T>({
   persist = true,
   autoRefresh = true,
   enabled = true,
-  demoWhenEmpty = false,
+  demoWhenEmpty = demoData !== undefined,
   liveInDemoMode = false,
   merge,
   shared = true,
